message:
✨ Add refresh button for unreachable clusters

Add a retry/refresh button next to the WifiOff badge on unreachable
clusters in the ClusterGrid component. This allows users to manually
trigger a reconnection attempt for clusters that failed to connect.

Changes:
- Add onRefresh and isRefreshing props to ClusterGrid
- Show refresh button with spinner animation when refreshing
- Pass refetch callback from useClusters to ClusterGrid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
